overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage depicting a character in a white lab coat navigating a prison facility at night. The character moves from outdoor alleyways and overgrown yards into indoor cell blocks and corridors, eventually ascending a staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown alley between concrete walls leading to prison yard

events.description: exits narrow alleyway into open prison yard with trees and perimeter fence

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow passage with overgrown grass between high concrete walls

entered.detail: tall grey concrete wall with rough texture forming the left boundary of the alley
red brick building wall with barred windows on the right side
tall wild grass covering the ground in the alley and yard
high concrete prison wall with barbed wire fencing along the top
tall leafy trees scattered throughout the prison yard
large institutional building with flat roof and small windows
parked military vehicles visible in the background near the building
simple wooden bench sitting against the perimeter wall

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a narrow alleyway flanked by a concrete block wall and red brick building, emerging into an open prison yard with overgrown vegetation. The area is dimly lit at night, with a perimeter fence and barbed wire visible along the left side and institutional buildings ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: prison building entrance with lit doorway

events.description: screen fades to black transitioning from outdoor to indoor environment

agents.ego_description: approaching the prison building entrance where a guard stands watch near the doorway

notable_agents.action: guard in military uniform standing near entrance holding rifle

entered.detail: main entrance doorway with concrete steps leading into the building
warm yellow exterior lamps illuminating the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the prison building entrance, passing from the open yard to the threshold of the structure. A guard stands watch near the lit doorway as the scene transitions to darkness, indicating entry into the interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: prison cell block with metal bars and concrete corridors

events.description: emerges from black screen inside prison cell and exits into corridor
passes a prison guard walking in the opposite direction down the corridor

agents.ego_description: navigating through prison cell block and corridors, passing metal bars and concrete walls

notable_agents.action: prison guard walking toward camera then passing by on the left

entered.detail: black metal cell bars with vertical rails forming the prison cells
simple metal bed frame with mattress inside the cell
rough concrete walls with pipes running along the right side
fluorescent tube lights hanging from the corridor ceiling
horizontal metal pipes running along the wall at waist height
heavy wooden door with metal reinforcement at the corridor end

segments.scene_description: The character finds themselves inside a dimly lit prison cell block with metal bars and concrete walls. They exit the initial cell area into a corridor where they pass a prison guard walking in the opposite direction, continuing past pipe-lined walls toward a wooden door.

scene_state.functional_zone: prison interior corridor with pipes and ascending staircase

events.description: passes second guard standing by wall and continues toward staircase
begins ascending concrete staircase with red handrail

agents.ego_description: walking through corridors, passing a stationary guard, and climbing stairs to upper level

notable_agents.action: guard standing by wall looking at pipes as camera passes

entered.detail: walls painted blue on the lower half with cream color above
red fire extinguisher in a wall-mounted case
metal mesh security gate at the corridor junction
concrete stairs with worn steps leading upward
painted red metal handrail along the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a corridor with blue painted walls and exposed metal pipes, passing a stationary guard before reaching a staircase. They begin ascending the concrete stairs with a red handrail, moving toward an upper level of the facility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit outdoor prison perimeter into the sterile, claustrophobic interior of the facility. It begins in a narrow alleyway between concrete and brick walls, moving forward to emerge into an open yard filled with overgrown vegetation and barbed wire fences. As the character approaches the building, the scene transitions from the open night air through a lit doorway guarded by a sentry and into the darkness of the interior. The camera then shifts into a dimly lit cell block of metal bars and concrete, gliding through a pipe-lined corridor past patrolling guards before entering a section with blue painted walls. Finally, the movement leads toward a concrete staircase with a red handrail, ascending toward the upper levels of the facility.
